TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Anthony_Avent, title = Anthony_Avent, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Anthony_Avent} }

S.FORM: Anthony Avent sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1969, ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 10, Anthony Avent, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) Anthony Avent htagan beh sa Rocky Mount, North Carolina. sraral ga maki Seton Hall hopa pqwasan biru pcbaq biru ru kawas tay 1989 sakang' NCAA mpspung. Anthony Avent mqwas beh Newark, New Jersey Malcolm X Shabazz gocyu. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Anthony Avent sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1969, ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 10, Anthony Avent, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya(qyanux nya) Anthony Avent htagan beh sa Rocky Mount, North Carolina. sraral ga maki Seton Hall hopa pqwasan biru pcbaq biru ru kawas tay 1989 sakang' NCAA mpspung. Anthony Avent mqwas beh Newark, New Jersey Malcolm X Shabazz gocyu. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: antħonj a*ent s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, antħonj a*ent, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qnxan nja(qjanux nja) antħonj a*ent ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa roʦ~ʨkj mount, nortħ ʦ~ʨarolina. s~ɕraral ɣa maki s~ɕeton ħall ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru pʦ~ʨβaq βiru ru kawas~ɕ taj **** s~ɕakaŋʔ nʦ~ʨaa mps~ɕpuŋ. antħonj a*ent mqwas~ɕ βeħ newark, new *ers~ɕej malʦ~ʨolm x s~ɕħaβazz ɣoʦ~ʨju. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
